summary: UI redesign verification completed. All 5 color-coded blocks displaying correctly with proper titles. Backend API tests pass 100% (14/14). Frontend interactions (sale modal, client modal, Pay Period filter, Update button) all working correctly.
passed_tests: Block 1 (green) - 'My Money' with 5 KPIs (Revenue, Commission, Closed Deals, Closing Rate, Avg Ticket) and 3 payment items (Installations, Commission Payable, SPIFF Included)
Block 2 (amber) - 'How Can I Earn More?' with Under Book Price (5% Commission) and SPIFF Breakdown sections
Block 3 (blue) - 'What Am I Selling?' with 3 charts (Unit Type pie, Revenue by Type bar, Monthly Revenue area)
Block 4 (purple) - 'Closed Sales' table with fewer mobile columns (Name, City hidden on lg, Unit hidden on xl, Value, Commission, Date)
Block 5 (red) - 'Action Required!' with pulsing phone icon, badge count (6), gradient top bar, URGENT labels
Clicking sale row in Block 4 opens sale detail modal with commission breakdown
Clicking follow-up row in Block 5 opens client detail modal with full details
Pay Period filter change refreshes data correctly (tested Jan 22 - Feb 04 period)
Update button refreshes data and shows toast notification
Backend API /api/dashboard/kpis returns all required fields

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 blocks, modals, filters working correctly

seed_data_creation: None - uses live Google Sheet data
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign successfully verified. 5-block layout: Block 1 (green/My Money) has 5 KPIs + 3 payment items; Block 2 (amber/How Can I Earn More?) has Under Book Price + SPIFF; Block 3 (blue/What Am I Selling?) has 3 charts; Block 4 (purple/Closed Sales) has table; Block 5 (red/Action Required!) has follow-ups with pulsing icon. Leads KPI removed from Block 1. Revenue removed from Payment section. Deal Status chart removed from Block 3.
